data.description:
## What
Two follow-ups spun out of dc3f (puzzling-obsidian-bunny) after its core gap — 3 undeployed CloudWatch alarms — was fixed by a terraform apply. Neither is autonomously completable (one needs a human inbox action; one is a standalone infra project).

## Scope
- The rebar-gerrit-alerts SNS email subscription is PendingConfirmation (auto-deletes ~72h unconfirmed).
- No terraform CI exists (apply is manual per infra/runbooks/provision-restore.md), so committed HCL can silently sit unapplied (the root cause of dc3f).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] rebar-gerrit-alerts actually delivers: confirm the pending email to joeoakhart@navapbc.com, OR replace it with a confirmation-free sink (AWS Chatbot/Slack, HTTPS, or SQS+Lambda) in infra/terraform/monitoring.tf.
- [ ] A drift-detection CI runs 'terraform plan' on changes under infra/terraform/ (GitHub OIDC role in account 896586841071) and fails on un-applied drift.
- [ ] Reconcile the incidental orphan alarm rebar-gerrit-data-disk-high (live but absent from HCL/state).
data.title: rebar-gerrit alerting hardening: confirm/replace SNS subscription + add terraform drift CI
